principal_diagnosis.value: Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA) with Uncontrolled Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus

hospital_course.value: Patient presented with generalized weakness and myalgia. Admitted for management of DKA in the setting of uncontrolled Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus. Concurrent infections identified including acute pyelonephritis and cholecystitis. Patient was managed medically during admission. [Detailed hospital course — requires clinician input]
